protocol_notes: Purchased 2mg vial from UK-PEPTIDES vendor. Independent HPLC/DAD testing revealed vial contained 1.05mg of active TB-500 (approximately 52.5% of advertised dose). Purity was high at 98%+. Testing performed by third-party lab using comparison to 4.55mg known standard sample. Vendor claims to perform in-house HPLC and Mass Spectrometry testing but did not respond to inquiry about discrepancy. Vendor previously had Eroids score reset to zero for paying for fake reviews.
